name: com.jlinkdev.unity-utilities
description: Reusable Unity utilities, shaders, editor tools, and systems for Unity projects.

samples.description: Sample showing single-prefab pooling with GameObjectPoolHandle and multi-prefab pooling with GameObjectPoolRegistry.
Sample scripts and setup notes for testing TwoBoneIK, FABRIKChain, AimIK, and GroundProbe with runtime grid controls.
